steps.title: Identify the constraints from the requirement
steps.content:
The requirement states at least 21 of the 27 scheduled council meetings. This phrase contains two constraints:
  • At least 21 means: $$x \geq 21$$
  • Of the 27 scheduled meetings means Cristina can attend no more than 27 meetings, so: $$x \leq 27$$

steps.title: Combine the constraints into a compound inequality
steps.content: Both constraints must be satisfied simultaneously. Writing them together as a single compound inequality: $$21 \leq x \leq 27$$ This matches choice C — C is correct.
